subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant, and staunch! The letter which thou didst write ... hath been shown to me, and the opinions expressed therein
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکتوبی که بمستر دیلی مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید بسیار رای
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity
